title: taraxacum leptocarpum
intro: Taraxacum leptocarpum, also known as the small-pod dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing swelling and improving digestion, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum leptocarpum typically involve using the roots, leaves, and flowers to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
